system.description: An ashwood spear with an iron point that belonged to one of the knights sent by the King and Queen to find Princess Tuvstarr. The knight lies dead near a dark pond, his eyes white and puffy like a sack of eggs ready to burst. This lance was the weapon that mortally wounded Skutt the moose, though the beast could not truly die due to Tuvstarr's wish. The tip of the lance can ignite at will, casting light and providing a burning fire always at hand. When wielded with skill, it can inflict additional wounds on enemies.
